prompt: Tight detail shot of a worn brown leather contractor's tool belt hanging from a single nail driven into a fresh stud at a job site. The belt is empty of tools — just the leather pouches with their stitched seams visible, a hammer loop, a few suspender clips. Saw dust on the sub-floor below, an extension cord trails out of frame. Shot with a 100mm macro lens, shallow depth of field — the leather grain and stitching tack-sharp, the studs softly defocused. Single warm tungsten work-lamp from the right, deep falloff into the shadow side, mood is quiet and committed. Slightly desaturated palette, brand red appears on a small Milwaukee carpenter pencil tucked into one pouch as the only saturated color. NOT HGTV bright. Working-contractor catalog feel. No readable text, no logos.
